channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Maritime Authority Allows Temporary 20% Fare Increase Amid Oil Price Surge
item.description: The Maritime Industry Authority (Marina) has approved a temporary increase of up to 20 percent in passenger ferry fares due to the ongoing crisis in the Middle East, which has affected global oil supp...

item.title: Influence of Shakespeare on Kannada Literature and Cinema
item.description: The article explores the enduring influence of William Shakespeare on Kannada literature and cinema, tracing adaptations from the 19th century to the present day. Beginning with Channabasappa’s 1871 p...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Continues Hearing Witnesses on Allegations of Corruption and Political Interference
item.description: The Madlanga Commission of Inquiry, chaired by retired Justice Mbuyiseli Madlanga, continues its proceedings in Pretoria. The commission is tasked with investigating claims of criminality, corruption,...

item.title: EFCC Intercepts Wife of Chief Judge Tsoho With $160,000 Cash Amid Asset Declaration Inquiry
item.description: Nigerians dey hear say the EFCC don intercept di wife of Chief Judge of Federal High Court, Justice John Tsoho, as she dey travel go Benue State, and dem find $160,000 cash for her hand. Di operatives...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Forecasts Less Rain Nationwide with Isolated Heavy Showers in Some Regions
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has issued its 7-day weather outlook for March 10 to March 16, 2026, indicating that overall rainfall will reduce across most parts of Kenya. However, the weatherma...

item.title: Igor Tudor seeks fresh approach for Tottenham in Champions League amid Premier League struggles
item.description: Tottenham Hotspur manager Igor Tudor has acknowledged the club's pressing focus on Premier League survival but is encouraging the team to adopt a new mindset for their upcoming Champions League tie ag...

item.title: Msalato women contribute food and labour to Chikole Secondary School feeding programme
item.description: Women from Msalato Ward don step up to help students at Chikole Secondary School by providing food and working for the school feeding programme. Dis programme aim to make sure students get proper meal...

item.title: Unable to access article: connection error prevents content retrieval
item.description: The National Post article titled 'Ivison: Carney’s credibility faces friendly fire in war with Iran' could not be accessed due to a technical error. When attempting to load the article, the server ret...

item.title: A Detailed Review of the Marshall Acton III Bluetooth Home Speaker
item.description: The Marshall Acton III is a compact Bluetooth home speaker that has impressed many users with its sound quality, design, and ease of use. Alice Prendergast, a contributor to CTV Shopping Trends, share...

item.title: Iran's Retaliatory Strikes and Strategy Amid US Military Pressure
item.description: Iran has escalated tensions in the Middle East following US and Israeli military actions, with experts describing Tehran's approach as focused on regime survival rather than outright victory. Since th...

item.title: Cachalia warns N2 highway wall alone won’t stop crime in Cape Town
item.description: Acting Police Minister Firoz Cachalia has cautioned that the proposed eight-kilometre security wall along the N2 highway in Cape Town, projected to cost R114 million, will not, by itself, stop crime. ...

item.title: QC fire evacuees raise concerns over evacuation center conditions
item.description: Residents displaced by the recent fire in Quezon City have shared their experiences regarding the state of local evacuation centers. Many evacuees reported overcrowding, insufficient sleeping spaces, ...

item.title: Ukraine Provides Expertise to Help Other Countries Counter Iranian Drones
item.description: Ukraine imesha toa msaada wake kwa nchi mbalimbali kuhusiana na drones za Iran. Rais Volodymyr Zelenskiy amesema kuwa nchi jirani na Iran, pamoja na Marekani na baadhi ya nchi za Ulaya, wameshakuomba ...

item.title: Filipinos anticipate Tanggol’s final showdown in FPJ’s Batang Quiapo
item.description: ABS-CBN reports that Filipino audiences are eagerly tuning in to witness the climactic final battle of the beloved character Tanggol in the hit TV series “FPJ’s Batang Quiapo.” The show, which has cap...

item.title: Sleep expert answers questions on adjusting to permanent daylight saving time in B.C. and improving sleep habits
item.description: In a live Q&A published by The Globe and Mail, sleep expert Dr. Rébecca Robillard, a clinical neuropsychologist and associate professor at the University of Ottawa, addressed reader concerns about sle...

item.title: Nigeria dey attract global luxury brands due to rising digital economy and wealthy youth
item.description: Naija dey turn one big target for global luxury brands as dem dey look new markets beyond Europe, North America and some parts of Asia. Indian entrepreneur, Prateek Suri, talk say the young population...

item.title: President Marcos Holds Bilateral Meeting with UN Secretary-General Guterres in New York, Discusses Security Council Bid
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. held a bilateral meeting with United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres at the UN headquarters in New York on March 9, 2026. This took place during the President...

item.title: Delays and exaggerations in Essex supercomputer project raise questions over UK AI investments
item.description: The planned Essex supercomputer, touted in government announcements as a cutting-edge facility due by the end of 2026, remains undeveloped, currently functioning as a scaffolding and scrap metal depot...

item.title: KNEC Confirms KCSE Kenyan Sign Language Graded Only for Hearing-Impaired Candidates
item.description: The Kenya National Examinations Council (KNEC) has clarified that Kenyan Sign Language (KSL) exams in the KCSE are strictly meant for learners with hearing impairment. This comes after some confusion ...

item.title: Arusha Prepares for IPU Meeting and AFCON 2027 with Infrastructure Upgrades
item.description: Arusha region is preparing to host the Inter-Parliamentary Union (IPU) meeting in August 2026, and this event is expected to boost trade and tourism as hundreds of parliamentarians from all over di wo...
